intro1: We are your board game store and community. Here you will find classics, new releases and everything you need to enjoy great matches. From traditional games like chess, truco cards and checkers, to modern and international titles like King of New York or Pandemic. We have options for all tastes and experience levels.
intro2: Our mission is to bring board games closer to everyone: from those looking for a quick and simple match to fans of the most complex strategic experiences. We don’t just sell games: we build community. We organize events, share reviews and help you find the perfect game for you.
searchPriceHelp: You can search by minimum price, maximum price or both at once
hoursValue: Monday to Friday • 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM • 2:00 PM to 6:00 PM
